repo.name: Agent-OS
repo.description: Agent OS - A modern operating system for AI agents

issues.title: feat: 10 production features
issues.body:
## 10 New Features (6,430 lines added)

### Browser Core
1. **Proxy Support** — HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS5, single or round-robin rotation
2. **Retry/Error Recovery** — Exponential backoff with jitter, permanent error detection
3. **Network Traffic Logging** — All requests/responses with filtering, last 1000/page

### Tools
4. **Smart Element Finder** — Find by text, role, aria-label, natural language description
5. **Structured Data Extraction** — Tables, lists, articles, JSON-LD, metadata, categorized links
6. **Page-to-Markdown** — Clean markdown for AI consumption with configurable options

### Stealth & Recording
7. **PDF Generation** — Full Playwright PDF with format, margins, headers/footers
8. **5 Stealth Profiles** — Windows/Chrome, macOS/Safari, Linux/Firefox, Android, iOS
9. **HAR 1.2 Recording** — Start/stop/save network traffic in HAR format

### Platform
10. **Webhook Event System** — HMAC-SHA256 signed callbacks for 14 event types

### Updated
- browser.py, server.py with 23 new commands
- All 4 connectors (MCP, OpenAI, OpenClaw, CLI) — 20+ new tools each
- API docs for every new endpoint
- Cleaned __pycache__ from git tracking

issues.title: Fix Docker networking + rewrite README
issues.body:
## Changes

- **Dockerfile**: fix playwright install-deps (font packages missing on slim), add libxfixes3 to runtime deps, add AGENT_OS_HOST env var for 0.0.0.0 binding
- **config.py**: read AGENT_OS_HOST env var so Docker containers can bind to 0.0.0.0 instead of 127.0.0.1
- **docker-compose.yml**: pass --agent-token via command so it actually works
- **README.md**: complete rewrite — leads with the real pain point (AI agents can't own a browser), direct comparisons against competitors, usage examples front and center

## Verified
- ✅ Direct Python: working
- ✅ Docker: working  
- ✅ Docker Compose: working
- ✅ Test suite: 29/29 passed

issues.title: fix: security hardening and bug fixes
issues.body:
## Security Fixes
- ✅ Real token authentication (validate against registered hashes)
- ✅ Auth on ALL endpoints (/status, /command, WebSocket)
- ✅ Removed --disable-web-security (SOP bypass risk)
- ✅ Encryption key separated from vault (~/.agent-os/keys/)
- ✅ Rate limiting (token-bucket, configurable)
- ✅ CORS support (configurable origins)
- ✅ TLS support (optional cert/key)
- ✅ Connection limits enforced

## Bug Fixes
- ✅ CLI shell injection (python3 json.dumps instead of string concat)
- ✅ Keyboard shortcuts (proper key resolution + combos like Control+c)
- ✅ Removed destructive SQLi payloads (no DROP TABLE, no SLEEP)
- ✅ XSS scanner uses marker strings (no alert() popups)
- ✅ RAM monitor enforces cap (closes idle tabs when over limit)
- ✅ Cookie saves optimized (dirty flag + 60s periodic flush)
- ✅ Config merge preserves defaults for missing keys
- ✅ README AES claim fixed (AES-128 Fernet, not AES-256)
- ✅ requirements.txt clarifies optional deps

## Tests
- 26/26 passing

pulls.title: feat: CLI script (74 commands), tests, .env.example
pulls.body:
Updates:
- CLI script: 25 → 74 commands (all new features accessible via bash)
- Tests: aligned with 39 MCP connector tools + import tests for new modules
- .env.example: added proxy, device, port, RAM config options

repo.description: Agent OS - A modern operating system for AI agents

repo.name: Agent-OS
repo.description: Agent OS - A modern operating system for AI agents

pulls.title: feat: 7 Major Features — 42 Tools Total
pulls.body:
## 🚀 7 New Production-Ready Features

### 1. 🔍 Smart Element Finder (`smart_finder.py`)
- Find elements by **visible text** — no CSS selector needed
- `smart-find`, `smart-click`, `smart-fill` commands
- Fuzzy matching, accessibility labels, placeholder, aria-label support
- Ranked results with confidence scores

### 2. 🎯 Multi-Step Workflow Engine (`workflow.py`)
- Chain multiple browser actions in one command
- Template variables: `{{var}}` substitution
- Error handling: abort, skip, retry with exponential backoff
- Save/load reusable workflow templates
- Built-in templates: google_search, login, screenshot_full

### 3. 📊 Network Capture (`network_capture.py`)
- Capture all HTTP/HTTPS requests from browser pages
- Filter by URL pattern (regex), method, resource type, status code
- API endpoint discovery — groups by base URL
- Export to JSON or HAR format
- Memory-safe with configurable limits (5000 entries, 5MB body cap)

### 4. 🧠 Page Analyzer (`page_analyzer.py`)
- **page-summary**: Title, headings, content, forms, links, tech stack detection
- **page-tables**: Extract all HTML tables as structured data
- **page-structured**: JSON-LD and Microdata extraction
- **page-emails**: Find all email addresses
- **page-phones**: Find all phone numbers
- **page-accessibility**: Basic a11y audit (alt text, labels, heading hierarchy)
- **page-seo**: SEO audit with score (title, meta, H1, canonical, Open Graph)

### 5. 🌐 Proxy Support
- HTTP, HTTPS, SOCKS5 proxy support
- `set-proxy` / `get-proxy` commands
- Auth support (user:pass@host:port)
- Config persists across restarts

### 6. 📱 Mobile Device Emulation
- 11 device presets: iPhone SE/14/14 Pro Max, Galaxy S23, Pixel 8, iPad, iPad Pro, Galaxy Tab S9, Desktop 1080/1440/4K
- Changes viewport, device scale factor, user agent, touch support
- `emulate-device` / `list-devices` commands

### 7. 🔄 Session Save/Restore
- Save full browser state: cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, open tabs
- Restore with one command — picks up right where you left off
- `save-session`, `restore-session`, `list-sessions`, `delete-session`

### Tool Count: 25 → **42 tools**

All connectors updated: MCP, OpenAI, OpenClaw.

pulls.title: fix: security hardening and bug fixes
pulls.body:
## Security Fixes
- ✅ Real token authentication (validate against registered hashes)
- ✅ Auth on ALL endpoints (/status, /command, WebSocket)
- ✅ Removed --disable-web-security (SOP bypass risk)
- ✅ Encryption key separated from vault (~/.agent-os/keys/)
- ✅ Rate limiting (token-bucket, configurable)
- ✅ CORS support (configurable origins)
- ✅ TLS support (optional cert/key)
- ✅ Connection limits enforced

## Bug Fixes
- ✅ CLI shell injection (python3 json.dumps instead of string concat)
- ✅ Keyboard shortcuts (proper key resolution + combos like Control+c)
- ✅ Removed destructive SQLi payloads (no DROP TABLE, no SLEEP)
- ✅ XSS scanner uses marker strings (no alert() popups)
- ✅ RAM monitor enforces cap (closes idle tabs when over limit)
- ✅ Cookie saves optimized (dirty flag + 60s periodic flush)
- ✅ Config merge preserves defaults for missing keys
- ✅ README AES claim fixed (AES-128 Fernet, not AES-256)
- ✅ requirements.txt clarifies optional deps

## Tests
- 26/26 passing

repo.name: Agent-OS
repo.description: Agent OS - A modern operating system for AI agents

repo.name: Agent-OS
repo.description: Agent OS - A modern operating system for AI agents

commit.message:
security: separate vault key from vault file using XDG data dir

- Vault key now stored in ~/.local/share/agent-os/ (XDG_DATA_HOME)
- Separate from vault.enc in ~/.agent-os/
- Auto-migrates existing key from legacy location
- Key permissions set to 0600

security: encrypt session cookies on disk

- Cookies now stored as .enc files using Fernet encryption
- Separate encryption key from vault key (.cookie_key)
- Key file permissions set to 0600 (owner-only)
- Old unencrypted cookie files will be ignored gracefully

fix: rate limiter bounded memory with periodic cleanup

- Background task cleans stale entries every 2 minutes
- Hard cap at 10000 unique identifiers (configurable)
- Evicts oldest 20% when cap exceeded
- Prevents DoS via rate limiter memory exhaustion

security: add auth to debug UI, fix CORS defaults

- Debug server now requires valid agent token for all endpoints
- Auth via Authorization header, query param, or cookie
- Static assets (CSS/JS) still accessible for UI loading
- CORS default changed from wildcard (*) to strict localhost
- Server CORS fallback also uses localhost instead of *

security: hash tokens in config, constant-time comparison, persist auto-generated tokens

- Config.set() no longer auto-saves on every call (batch writes)
- Auto-generated agent token now persisted to config (survives restarts)
- Token comparison uses hmac.compare_digest() to prevent timing attacks
- Added verify_token() method for constant-time hash verification

demo: full human capabilities — search, click, fill forms, tabs, mobile, cookies

Proves Agent-OS can do everything a human can do:
- Amazon: search products, browse results, add to cart
- Google: search and click results
- Wikipedia: read, extract data, SEO analysis
- GitHub: fill login form (username + password)
- Multi-tab: open, navigate, switch between tabs
- Network capture: monitor all HTTP requests
- Mobile emulation: browse as iPhone 14
- Table extraction: structured data from pages
- Session save/restore: persistent browser state
- Cookie management: get and set cookies

All screenshots captured as proof in proof/ directory.

test: 50-site stress test proof — 92% success rate with bot-protected sites

Screenshots from Amazon, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Booking.com,
NY Times, BBC, CNN, Walmart, eBay, Yahoo Finance, Google.

46/50 sites browsed successfully including heavy bot-detection sites.
Only 4 blocked (Cloudflare), 1 failed (HTTP/2 error).

Anti-detection: reCAPTCHA/hCaptcha/Cloudflare blocked before loading.
Human mimicry: Bezier mouse, typing delays, fingerprint spoofing.
fix: venv creation fallback for systems without ensurepip (Ubuntu 24.04+)

Production hardening: security fixes, CI/CD, license, test isolation

Security fixes:
- Remove --disable-web-security Chrome flag
- Restrict CORS to localhost:8002 (was *)
- Enforce token requirement (no dev-mode bypass)
- Mask token in startup logs
- Remove curl from Docker (Python healthcheck)
- Update .env.example to recommend --no-debug in production

Bug fixes:
- Fix config deepcopy bug (state bleed between instances)
- Fix all test temp paths for proper isolation
- Fix flaky test_token_validation_dev_mode
- Fix setup.sh: require venv, no system-wide fallback
- Fix MCP install conflict (use venv)
- Fix Qwen bridge API key placeholders

New files:
- MIT LICENSE
- GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow
- tools/.gitkeep

All 47 tests passing.

Production hardening: auth, rate limiting, CORS, code dedup, Docker security

- CRITICAL: Token authentication now validates against configured token (was accepting any token)
- Rate limiting added (60 req/min per token/IP, configurable via --rate-limit)
- CORS headers on all HTTP responses
- Debug UI port follows --port flag (port+2) instead of hardcoded 8002
- --no-debug flag to disable debug UI in production
- Code deduplication: anti-detection JS and bot blocking moved to shared src/core/stealth.py
- Token generation upgraded from 6 hex chars to 32 hex chars (128-bit)
- Config deep merge ensures all default keys exist even with partial config files
- Docker: non-root user (agentos), proper PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH
- Version strings unified to 2.1.0
- 11 new tests for auth, rate limiting, stealth module
- All 47 tests passing

feat: Proxy Rotation engine with health checking and intelligent failover

Proxy Rotation (src/tools/proxy_rotation.py):
- ProxyPool: add/remove/load from file (JSON/CSV/txt) or API
- ProxyHealthChecker: parallel health checks (TCP, HTTP, latency,
  anonymity detection, geo-location)
- ProxyRotator: 8 rotation strategies:
  round_robin, random, weighted, least_used, sticky,
  per_domain, fastest, geo
- Automatic failover: dead proxies auto-skipped, recovery probes
- Rate limit tracking: per-proxy request counts per minute
- Session affinity: same proxy per session/domain
- Geo-targeting: filter by ISO country code
- Proxy types: HTTP, HTTPS, SOCKS5 with auth
- Per-proxy stats: success rate, avg latency, failure streaks
- Persistence: save/load proxy pools to disk
- Background health monitoring with configurable interval

15 new API commands:
  proxy-add/remove/load-file/load-api
  proxy-get/record/check/check-all
  proxy-list/enable/disable
  proxy-strategy/stats/save/load

feat: Multi-Agent Browsing Sharing hub

AgentHub (src/tools/multi_agent.py):
- Agent Registry: register/unregister/heartbeat with auto-reap
- 4 roles: observer (read-only), operator (full browser),
  supervisor (operator + agent management), admin (everything)
- Role-based permission enforcement on all 90+ commands
- Lock Manager: shared/exclusive locks on pages/elements/tabs
  with TTL auto-release and acquisition timeout
- Task Board: create/claim/start/complete/fail/cancel tasks
  with priority, tags, dependencies, auto-retry
- Event Bus: pub/sub for cross-agent coordination
- Shared Memory: cross-agent KV store with TTL and access
  control (shared/private/readonly)
- Session Handoff: transfer control + locks between agents
- Audit Trail: full attribution of every agent action
- Background cleanup: dead agents, expired locks, stale events

25 new API commands:
  hub-register/unregister/heartbeat/status/agents
  hub-lock/unlock/locks
  hub-task-create/claim/start/complete/fail/cancel/tasks
  hub-broadcast/events
  hub-memory-set/get/delete/list
  hub-handoff/audit

feat: Session Recording & Replay engine

Session Recording (src/tools/session_recording.py):
- Full event capture: commands, network, DOM mutations, console logs,
  screenshots, scroll, cookies, localStorage, errors, heal/retry events
- Screenshot capture: interval-based (configurable) + event-triggered
- Memory management: buffer cap with disk spill for long sessions
- Sensitive data redaction: passwords/tokens auto-scrubbed
- Pause/resume, annotations, tagging

Session Replay:
- Replay commands with original timing
- Speed control: 0.1x to 10x
- Pause/resume/step/jump-to for debugging
- Skip specific event types
- Screenshot verification (visual diff)
- Export as reusable workflow JSON

Session Analyzer:
- Performance analysis: per-command timing, bottlenecks
- Error grouping and pattern detection
- Navigation flow extraction
- Full-text search across events by type, content, time range

21 new API commands:
  record-start/stop/pause/resume/annotate/status/list/delete
  replay-load/play/stop/pause/resume/step/jump/position/events/export-workflow
  analyze, analyze-search

feat: Auto-Retry engine with intelligent error classification

Auto-Retry (src/tools/auto_retry.py):
- Error classification: transient / rate_limit / timeout / network /
  permanent / browser_crash / unknown (pattern + status code matching)
- Adaptive backoff: exponential + jitter + Retry-After header respect
- Circuit breaker: per-operation, CLOSED→OPEN→HALF_OPEN state machine,
  configurable thresholds, auto-recovery probes
- Retry budgets: 100 retries/60s window, prevents retry storms
- Per-operation profiles: navigate gets 5 retries, click gets 3, etc.
- Request deduplication: coalesces identical concurrent requests
- Integration: wraps smart_wait (post-action) + auto_heal (fallback)
- Full observability: per-op stats, per-error-class stats, history

11 new API commands:
  retry-execute, retry-navigate, retry-click, retry-fill,
  retry-api-call, retry-stats, retry-health,
  retry-circuit-breakers, retry-reset-circuit, retry-reset-all-circuits

feat: Smart Wait + Auto-Heal engine

Smart Wait (src/tools/smart_wait.py):
- network_idle: waits for all fetch/XHR to settle
- dom_stable: MutationObserver-based DOM stability detection
- element_ready: visibility + interactable + animation checks
- page_ready: document.readyState + images + fonts + frameworks
- js_condition: wait for arbitrary JS truthy expression
- compose: AND/OR multi-condition composition
- auto: 'just works' combined strategy

Auto-Heal (src/tools/auto_heal.py):
- 7 recovery strategies: text, aria-label, attr fingerprint,
  structural path, visual proximity, role+text, tag+class
- Automatic fingerprint capture on successful selectors
- Disk-persisted fingerprint library (~/.agent-os/heal/)
- Heal-wrapped actions: click, fill, wait, hover, double-click
- Healing statistics and history tracking
- Heuristic fallback for selectors without fingerprints

17 new API commands (smart-wait-*, heal-*)

fix: 5 bugs found during full E2E testing

1. Device type: desktop_4k classified as tablet - fixed width/scale logic
2. Workflow: browser methods missing status field - false 'partial' results
3. Phone detector: matched IP addresses - now strips IPs first
4. CLI: missing get-text/get-attr commands in agent-os-tool.sh
5. Workflow screenshot: string result crashed on status assignment

All 38 tests passing.

feat: Cookie import/export in Debug UI

- Export: downloads all cookies as a timestamped JSON file
- Import: upload JSON file to set cookies in the browser
  - Supports multiple formats: export format, plain array, key-value dict
  - Handles Chrome-style fields (httpOnly, sameSite, etc.)
  - Shows import stats (imported/skipped count)
- API endpoints:
  - GET  /api/cookies/export — download cookies as JSON
  - POST /api/cookies/import — upload cookies from JSON

feat: Visual Debug UI — real-time web dashboard

- Added full debug server (src/debug/server.py) with WebSocket streaming
- Added production-grade dark-themed dashboard (HTML/CSS/JS)
- 9 panels: Live Browser, Sessions, Commands, Network, Console, DOM Inspector, Cookies, Page Analysis, Terminal
- Real-time screenshot streaming via WebSocket
- Quick commands bar for common actions
- Command terminal for running any Agent-OS command from the browser
- Integrated into main.py (auto-starts on port 8002)
- Updated config with debug_port setting
- Updated Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml (exposed port 8002)
- Updated README with full Visual Debug UI documentation
- Added 5 new tests (26/26 passing)

feat: add persistent Chromium engine for production scale

- New src/core/persistent_browser.py (1400+ lines):
  - PersistentBrowserManager: singleton browser pool manager
  - BrowserInstance: single Chromium process with multi-user contexts
  - UserContext: per-user isolated persistent context with state on disk
  - HealthMonitor: background health checks, auto-restart, memory caps
  - LRU eviction of idle contexts
  - Zero-downtime state persistence & restore
  - All 30+ browser commands via persistent API
  - Supports 250+ concurrent users (5 instances × 50 contexts)

- Config: added persistent.* settings (max_instances, idle_timeout, etc.)
- main.py: --persistent CLI flag, wires up PersistentBrowserManager
- server.py: /persistent/health, /persistent/users, /persistent/command endpoints
- README & API.md: full documentation with architecture, scaling, examples

docs: update README, API.md, and connector comments to match actual implementation

- README: accurate tool count (74 CLI / 38 connector tools), added all tool
  categories with tables, cookie management, console logs, CLI args, API
  endpoints, WebSocket examples
- API.md: complete rewrite covering all 74 commands with parameters, response
  formats, and examples. Added anti-detection details, configuration reference,
  error handling, connector tool counts
- Fixed incorrect '25 tools' references in openai_connector.py and
  openclaw_connector.py to '38 tools'
- Updated .env.example with additional options
